sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57953" key="klinopoiikh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλῑνο-ποιική</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>) <sense id="n57953.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the art of making beds</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:159" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.159</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
